author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for replacing the hand-rolled XML scanner in src/tool_intercept.rs:277-504 (parse_invocations / parse_shorthand_tag / parse_nested_elements) with quick-xml SAX parsing, plus a per-tool parameter schema enforcing only declared parameters, depth/attribute caps, symmetric entity decoding, and cargo-fuzz coverage. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires a new dependency (quick-xml), a tool schema registry change in src/tools/, and rewrites of every consumer of the parameters HashMap that currently tolerates unknown keys. The security-hardening surface (entity bomb, attribute injection, tag-confusion fuzz) needs dedicated test infrastructure (cargo-fuzz target + corpus). Owner-level work; partial mitigation possible by adding depth caps as a smaller follow-up if needed.
